descriptions.Safe: AQI 0-50, No respiratory irritation expected, outdoor activities safe for all groups
descriptions.Moderate: AQI 51-100, Some respiratory irritation for sensitive groups, caution for prolonged exposure
descriptions.Unhealthy: AQI 101-200, General population affected, sensitive groups should avoid outdoor activities
descriptions.Hazardous: AQI > 200, Everyone at risk, outdoor activities strongly discouraged

Moderate.conditions: Elevated AQI (51-100) OR moderate heat stress (THI 28-32)

Dangerous.conditions: High AQI (101-200) OR significant heat stress (THI > 32)

safe.general: Good conditions for outdoor activities. Enjoy the fresh air!
safe.sensitive_groups: Excellent conditions. Even sensitive groups can engage in outdoor activities.

moderate.general: Limit outdoor activities. Outdoor exercise should be moderated.
moderate.sensitive_groups: Sensitive groups should limit outdoor activities. Mild respiratory irritation possible.

unhealthy.general: Reduce outdoor activities. Everyone may experience respiratory irritation.
unhealthy.sensitive_groups: Sensitive groups should avoid outdoor activities.

hazardous.general: Avoid outdoor activities. Even short exposure is harmful.
hazardous.sensitive_groups: Must stay indoors. Condition poses serious health risk.
precautions: Wear N95 if must go outside
